generated_exposure.exposure_text: The new domestic security measures are working exactly as intended. Just last month, coordinated intelligence efforts prevented a major attack on our infrastructure. Critics who claim these powers infringe on civil liberties are either misinformed or have ulterior motives. We need to trust our institutions and give them the tools they need to keep us safe. #NationalSecurity #DomesticSecurity
